title: INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: OREGON COUNCIL ON DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on disability-related resources and groups. Resources include opportunities for trainings, consultations, and advocacy/self-advocacy, financial support for disability-related trainings and conferences, and advocacy for public policy affecting people with disabilities. Programs are for families and individuals affected by disability, direct care providers, case workers, and others. 2475 SE Ladd Avenue Suite 231 Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (971) 204-8824 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 204-8824 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Disabilities Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON COUNCIL ON DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES
